name: Mailchimp
description: Monitor Mailchimp subscriber lists and data handling for email marketing compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to Mailchimp > Profile > Extras > API keys
2. Create a new API key
3. Note your data center suffix from the key (e.g. 'us1' in 'xxx-us1')
4. Encode: base64('anystring:your_api_key')
5. Enter encoded value + data center below

credentialFields.label: Encoded API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Base64 encode 'anystring:your_api_key'. Example: base64('user:abc123def456-us1'). Use https://www.base64encode.org/

checks.name: Contact Information
checks.description: Verifies Mailchimp subscriber lists are maintained

checks.name: Data Masking
checks.description: Verifies Mailchimp GDPR data management tools are configured
